title: Semantic Kernel InMemoryVectorStore RCE via filter eval injection
description: The InMemoryCollection._parse_and_validate_filter method in Semantic Kernel accepts user-supplied lambda strings, validates them against an AST allowlist, then passes them to eval(). The allowlist permits ast.Attribute nodes but does not block dunder attributes such as __class__, __subclasses__, and __globals__, enabling sandbox escape via Python object hierarchy traversal (e.g., ().__class__.__bases__[0].__subclasses__()) to achieve arbitrary code execution.
